name: qq-mail
description: Control QQ Mail from Codex through a local IMAP/SMTP MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Read, search, send, move, and delete QQ Mail messages.
interface.longDescription: QQ Mail adds a local MCP server that connects to QQ Mail by IMAP and SMTP. It can list folders, search and read mail, send messages, mark read or unread, move, copy, delete, and append draft/archive messages.
defaultPrompt: 查看我的 QQ 邮箱收件箱
用 QQ 邮箱发送一封邮件
搜索 QQ 邮箱里的未读邮件
